nodes.title: models
widgets_values:
model (in checkpoint format, best for sfw and nsfw) :
(this goes into checkpoints folder instead of unet as usual)

https://civitai.com/models/2447875/ltx23-10eros?modelVersionId=2752410

distill lora (use with 0.85 strength) :
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/loras

clip models (both are needed) :

https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors

https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors

vae : https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae

nodes.title: --- 2-stage ltxv 2.3 image-to-video workflow ---
widgets_values:
* if you disable manual_prompts, you can use cached prompts you created.
* in that case, make sure to select precached negative inside the subgraph.
* you can try doing 1-stage (no upscaling) be sure to change scale to 1 when doing so.

nodes.title: nodes
widgets_values:
(cfz-caching is already present with comfyui-zluda and comfyui-rocm forks)

kjnodes :

https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes

ltxvideo (for the spatial tiled vae decoding) :

https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/

(if you want you can try comfy's native vae decoder or tiled-vae-decoding but they are not as good as spatio with amd gpus)
